holdings.infoBox: HCOW is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dell Technologies stock at 6.87%, TD SYNNEX at 4.53%, QUALCOMM at 3.91%, Delta Air Lines at 3.58%, and Reliance at 3.44%.

overview.description: The Amplify COWS Covered Call ETF (HCOW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in US stocks of dividend paying companies with high free cash flow yield combined with covered call writing strategy. The funds objective is to provide monthly income. HCOW was launched on Sep 20, 2023 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
